members.snippet: Survivors and first responders reported locked doors and a lack of signage marking emergency exits.

events.headline: 'If we die, we die together': Wife of man nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane speaks of ordeal

members.title: 'If we die, we die together': Wife of man nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane speaks of ordeal
members.snippet: Svetlana Grković told Serbian media that her husband is "seriously injured and in shock".

events.headline: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
events.slug: Hungaryparliamentvotesto

members.title: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
members.snippet: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years

events.headline: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
events.slug: USjudgevoidsDonaldTrumps

members.title: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
members.snippet: The judge said the suit was brought for 'improper purposes' and referred a Trump attorney for possible disciplinary acti

events.headline: EU bans gold imports from Sudan to curb money financing the war
events.slug: EUbansgoldimportsfromSud

members.title: EU bans gold imports from Sudan to curb money financing the war
members.snippet: The ban also restricts exports of mercury and cyanide to Sudan, chemicals widely used in gold mining.

events.headline: Bison rams grandfather in Yellowstone Park, knocking him metres into the air
events.slug: BisonramsgrandfatherinYe

members.title: Bison rams grandfather in Yellowstone Park, knocking him metres into the air
members.snippet: The man and his grandson appeared a safe distance away from the bison before it quickly chased them down.

events.headline: Emir of Qatar receives condolences on the death of the Father Emir
events.slug: EmirofQatarreceivescondo

members.title: Emir of Qatar receives condolences on the death of the Father Emir
members.snippet: Condolences from several government leaders, who expressed their sincere sympathy to Qatar, its leadership and people.

members.title: Photos: Wildfires ravage historic forest near Paris
members.snippet: Wildfires near Paris scorch 1,300 hectares as France endures its third heatwave in three months.

events.headline: ‘Country grows, we grow too’: 1 million migrants seek legal status in Spain
events.slug: Countrygrowswegrowtoo1mi

members.title: ‘Country grows, we grow too’: 1 million migrants seek legal status in Spain
members.snippet: The government expected half a million people to apply, but nearly double that number came forward.
